calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Nov-01-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Marta Eisenberg specially appearing for Nancy Rasch for Debra Dolch who is present in Court.

The sale for 100% interest was confirmed at $1,560,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 9/18/17. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). An additional bond is not required.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Nuque. (Not Reported)
